description: Restore the Lobby Track visitor database using the backup file located at C:\LobbyTrackBackup\LobbyTrackDB_backup.mdb (/home/ga/.wine/drive_c/LobbyTrackBackup/LobbyTrackDB_backup.mdb). After restoring the records, create a confirmation file at C:\LobbyTrackBackup\restore_confirmation.txt containing the text 'Database restored successfully' and the approximate number of records restored.
